div.div: Asset is first-class (not a view): represents unsold / society_retained stock + owner history. status=allotted only ever set by ownership assignment; PATCH may only move available ⇄ society_retained (409 while allotted).

div.div: Transfer = close-and-create: POST /ownerships/{id}/transfer closes the old record, creates the new one, re-points Asset.current_ownership. 409 if unsettled charges (settle-before-transfer); 422 if receiving member not active. Records never rewritten. Dividend = ownership without a physical asset.
